item.title:
⭐ And the winners of #BuildWithYou: Crypto Confession
@rezenoirdawg, @AlphaX_Crypt0, @joshboy105, @...
item.description:
⭐ And the winners of #BuildWithYou: Crypto Confession
@rezenoirdawg, @AlphaX_Crypt0, @joshboy105, @Biggyy91, @ebube_era, @itsmoniruzzaman, @vaniabona1, @01Reere, @hellojahid24, @0xTasu, @XPharmax, @Nkem12Destiny, @kennit0o, @parijat_pa29966, @onkoy3, @_Snowyflake, @bunmightojo, @Cire_Chandan, @MyMomMyLove1, @shaunx47
Thank you all for building with us. 💛 The ideas, effort, and energy from this round truly stood out.
Each of you has won 100 USDC. Prizes will be distributed within 14 days.
More #BuildWithYou challenges coming soon. Stay tuned 👀
--- @binance | ❤️ 26 | 🔁 3 | 💬 14 | 👁 3472
item.author: @binance

item.title: Yeehaw I'm #3 for 🇧🇷 Sao Paulo in https://t.co/ReWecdDgsF #vibejam https://t.co/ioBMV15UPt

item.author: @gdb

item.title: 看到大众对 V4 的肤浅的评价 更能感觉到这句话的分量很重 「不诱于誉，不恐于诽，率道而行，端然正己。」
item.description:
看到大众对 V4 的肤浅的评价 更能感觉到这句话的分量很重 「不诱于誉，不恐于诽，率道而行，端然正己。」
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 958
item.author: @oran_ge
